name: agent402-client
description: Buyer-side SDK for Agent402.Tools (x402): resolve a task to a tool across 1,338 pay-per-call endpoints and call it with payment handled for you — free tools settle via built-in proof-of-work (no wallet), wallet-only tools via your x402 fetch. Caching, idempotent retries, cross-seller Smart Order Router.
author: Mike Petrillo <mike@agent402.tools> (https://github.com/MikeyPetrillo)
